summary: Comprehensive testing of EdTech CRM Platform new features completed. Backend: 32/33 tests passed (97%). Frontend: All critical flows working. 6 new features tested: Student Profile Edit, Demo Sessions, Class Proof Verification, Complaints System, Counsellor Student Profile Popup, and Admin Complaints Tab.

minor.issue: User model doesn't include institute, goal, preferred_time_slot fields - these are stored in DB but not returned by /auth/me endpoint
minor.impact: Student profile edit dialog doesn't pre-populate with existing values from /auth/me response

integration_issues.issue: Profile fields (institute, goal, preferred_time_slot) not pre-populated because /auth/me doesn't return these fields

backend: All 4 role logins (admin, student, teacher, counsellor)
/api/counsellor/student-profile/{id} - returns full profile with assignment and class history
frontend: Student login and dashboard loads with Edit Profile and Complaints buttons
Student profile edit dialog opens with all fields (phone, institute, goal, time slot)
Student complaints page navigation and create complaint dialog
Counsellor login and dashboard loads with stats and quick actions
Counsellor All Students page shows student cards with profile details
Counsellor student profile popup shows full details (institute, goal, time slot, credits, assignment)
Counsellor proofs page with Pending/All tabs
Teacher login and dashboard with Create Class button
Teacher Create Class dialog with Demo toggle checkbox
Admin login and dashboard with all tabs (Teachers, Classes, Transactions, Complaints)
Admin Complaints tab shows complaints from all roles

action_items: Update User model in server.py to include institute, goal, preferred_time_slot fields so /auth/me returns them
This will allow StudentDashboard to pre-populate profile edit dialog with existing values
critical_code_review_comments: User model (line 36-47) missing institute, goal, preferred_time_slot fields that are stored in DB
The /auth/me endpoint returns User.model_dump() which excludes these fields
Counsellor's /api/counsellor/student-profile correctly returns all fields by querying DB directly
seed_data_creation: Test complaints created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new features are working. The only issue is User model missing profile fields. Student1 has profile data set (TEST_MIT, TEST_Crack JEE Advanced, TEST_Weekdays 5-7 PM). Teacher1 has 50 credits in wallet. Both students are assigned to Teacher1. Complaints system working for all non-admin roles.

mocked_apis.Stripe payment checkout: Uses test key, no real webhook

features_verified.student_profile_edit: WORKING - API updates DB, but /auth/me doesn't return profile fields
features_verified.demo_session_flow: WORKING - Demo toggle visible in teacher create class dialog
features_verified.class_proof_verification: WORKING - Teacher can submit proof, counsellor can verify
features_verified.complaint_system: WORKING - All non-admin roles can create, admin can view/resolve
features_verified.counsellor_student_popup: WORKING - Shows full profile with institute, goal, time slot, assignment info
features_verified.admin_complaints_tab: WORKING - Shows all complaints with role info
